title: Add ClearMessage::Profile variant to nie-core
description: Add Profile { fields: HashMap<String, String> } to the ClearMessage enum in core/src/messages.rs. This is the wire type for user profile broadcasts. Relay routes it as an opaque payload — no relay changes needed. Add serde tag so it serializes as {"type":"profile","fields":{...}}. Update any exhaustive match arms in the codebase.
